## WrapperSpec.positionalOperandsBeforeCommand property

The number of plain (non-flag, non-assignment-operand) words this wrapper requires \*before\* the wrapped command word — e.g. `timeout`<!-- -->'s mandatory `DURATION` operand (`timeout 10 rm -rf x`<!-- -->).

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly positionalOperandsBeforeCommand?: number;
```
